text: devar-yehva ׀ asher haya el-tsefaneya ben-kushi ven-gedaleya ben-amareya ben-chizeqiya bimey yoshiyahu ven-amovn melekh yehuda
asof asef kol me'al peney haadama neum-yehva
asef adam uvehema asef 'ovf-hashamayim udegey hayam vehamakheshelovt et-haresha'im vehikherati et-haadam me'al peney haadama neum-yehva
venatiti yadi 'al-yehuda ve'al kal-yovshevey yerushalaim vehikherati min-hamaqovm haze et-shear haba'al et-shem hakemarim 'im-hakohanim
veet-hamishetachavim 'al-hagagovt litseva hashamayim veet-hamishetachavim hanisheba'im layhva vehanisheba'im bemalekam
veet-hanesovgim meacharey yehva vaasher lo-viqeshu et-yehva velo derashuhu
has mipeney adonay yehvi ki qarovv yovm yehva ki-hekhin yehva zevach hiqedish qeruayv
vehaya beyovm zevach yehva ufaqadeti 'al-hasarim ve'al-beney hamelekh ve'al kal-haloveshim malebush nakheri
ufaqadeti 'al kal-hadovleg 'al-hamifetan bayovm hahu hamemaleim beyt adoneyhem chamas umirema s
vehaya vayovm hahu neum-yehva qovl tse'aqa misha'ar hadagim vilala min-hamishene veshever gadovl mehageva'ovt
heylilu yoshevey hamakhetesh ki nidema kal-'am kena'an nikheretu kal-netiley khasef
vehaya ba'et hahi achapes et-yerushalaim banerovt ufaqadeti 'al-haanashim haqofeim 'al-shimereyhem haomerim bilevavam lo-yeytiv yehva velo yare'a
vehaya cheylam limeshisa uvateyhem lishemama uvanu vatim velo yeshevu venate'u kheramim velo yishetu et-yeynam
qarovv yovm-yehva hagadovl qarovv umaher meod qovl yovm yehva mar tsorecha sham gibovr
yovm 'evera hayovm hahu yovm tsara umetsuqa yovm shoa umeshova yovm choshekh vaafela yovm 'anan va'arafel
yovm shovfar uteru'a 'al he'arim habetsurovt ve'al hapinovt hagevohovt
vahatseroti laadam vehalekhu ka'iverim ki layhva chatau veshupakh damam ke'afar ulechumam kagelalim
gam-kasepam gam-zehavam lo-yukhal lehatsilam beyovm 'everat yehva uveesh qineatov teakhel kal-haarets ki-khala akhe-nivehala ya'ase et kal-yoshevey haarets s
hiteqovsheshu vaqovshu hagovy lo nikhesaf
beterem ledet choq kemots 'avar yovm beterem ׀ lo-yavov 'aleykhem charovn af-yehva beterem lo-yavov 'aleykhem yovm af-yehva
baqeshu et-yehva kal-'anevey haarets asher mishepatov pa'alu baqeshu-tsedeq baqeshu 'anava ulay tisateru beyovm af-yehva
ki 'aza 'azuva tiheye veasheqelovn lishemama ashedovd batsahorayim yegareshuha ve'eqerovn te'aqer s
hovy yoshevey chevel hayam govy keretim devar-yehva 'aleykhem kena'an erets pelishetim vehaavadetikh meeyn yovshev
vehayeta chevel hayam neot kerot ro'im vegiderovt tson
vehaya chevel lisheerit beyt yehuda 'aleyhem yire'un bevatey asheqelovn ba'erev yirebatsun ki yifeqedem yehva eloheyhem veshav shevutam kh shevitam q
shama'eti cherepat movav vegidufey beney 'amovn asher cherefu et-'ami vayagedilu 'al-gevulam

lakhen chay-ani neum yehva tsevaovt elohey yiserael ki-movav kisedom tiheye uveney 'amovn ka'amora mimeshaq charul umikhereh-melach ushemama 'ad-'ovlam sheerit 'ami yevazum veyeter govy kh govyi q yinechalum
zot lahem tachat geovnam ki cherefu vayagedilu 'al-'am yehva tsevaovt
novra yehva 'aleyhem ki raza et kal-elohey haarets veyishetachavu-lov ish mimeqovmov kol iyey hagovyim
gam-atem kushim chaleley charebi hema
veyet yadov 'al-tsafovn viabed et-ashur veyasem et-nineve lishemama tsiya kamidebar
veravetsu vetovkhah 'adarim kal-chayetov-govy gam-qaat gam-qipod bekhafetoreyha yalinu qovl yeshovrer bachalovn chorev basaf ki areza 'era
zot ha'ir ha'aliza hayovshevet lavetach haomera bilevavah ani veafesi 'ovd eykh ׀ hayeta leshama marebets lachaya kol 'ovver 'aleyha yisheroq yani'a yadov s
hovy morea venigeala ha'ir hayovna
lo shame'a beqovl lo laqecha musar bayhva lo vatacha el-eloheyha lo qareva
sareyha veqirebah arayovt shoagim shofeteyha zeevey 'erev lo garemu laboqer
nevieyha pochazim aneshey bogedovt kohaneyha chilelu-qodesh chamesu tovra
yehva tsadiq beqirebah lo ya'ase 'avela baboqer baboqer mishepatov yiten laovr lo ne'edar velo-yovde'a 'aval boshet
hikherati govyim nashamu pinovtam hecheraveti chutsovtam mibeli 'ovver nitsedu 'areyhem mibeli-ish meeyn yovshev
amareti akhe-tirei ovti tiqechi musar velo-yikaret me'ovnah kol asher-paqadeti 'aleyha akhen hishekimu hishechitu kol 'alilovtam
lakhen chaku-li neum-yehva leyovm qumi le'ad ki mishepati leesof govyim leqavetsi mamelakhovt lishepokh 'aleyhem za'emi kol charovn api ki beesh qineati teakhel kal-haarets
ki-az ehepokh el-'amim safa verura liqero khulam beshem yehva le'avedov shekhem echad
me'ever lenaharey-khush 'ataray bat-putsay yovvilun minechati
bayovm hahu lo tevovshi mikol 'alilotayikh asher pasha'at bi ki-az ׀ asir miqirebekh 'alizey gaavatekh velo-tovsifi legaveha 'ovd behar qadeshi
vehisheareti veqirebekh 'am 'ani vadal vechasu beshem yehva
sheerit yiserael lo-ya'asu 'avela velo-yedaberu khazav velo-yimatse befihem leshovn taremit ki-hema yire'u veravetsu veeyn macharid s
rani bat-tsiyovn hari'u yiserael simechi ve'alezi bekhal-lev bat yerushalaim
hesir yehva mishepatayikh pina oyevekh melekh yiserael ׀ yehva beqirebekh lo-tirei ra' 'ovd
bayovm hahu yeamer lirushalaim al-tirai tsiyovn al-yirepu yadayikh
yehva elohayikh beqirebekh gibovr yovshi'a yasis 'alayikh besimecha yacharish beahavatov yagil 'alayikh berina
nugey mimov'ed asafeti mimekh hayu maseet 'aleyha cherepa
hineni 'ose et-kal-me'anayikh ba'et hahi vehovsha'eti et-hatsole'a vehanidacha aqabets vesametim litehila uleshem bekhal-haarets bashetam
ba'et hahi avi etekhem uva'et qabetsi etekhem ki-eten etekhem leshem velitehila bekhol 'amey haarets beshuvi et-shevuteykhem le'eyneykhem amar yehva
